name: plausibilityCheck

statement.text: The cat sat on the warm mat.
The dead man spoke clearly to the crowd.

_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'commonsense.plausibilityCheck'. CommonsenseActionPanel.tsx sends {artifact:{data:{statement:{text}}}} (was wrongly sending a BARE STRING → statement.text undefined → empty analysis; FIXED). Returns {plausibilityScore,plausibilityLabel,violations:{count,items:[{type,description,severity}]},constraintsSatisfied,totalChecksPerformed,eventsAnalyzed} — the EXACT fields the result card reads (was reading {verdict,reasoning} which the handler never returns → dead card; FIXED). Deterministic pure compute: regex causal/temporal/spatial/physical violation detection + constraint relevance + severity-adjusted score (Math.max(0, score - high*15)). POISON: event 'time' strings flow through new Date(t).getTime(); 'Infinity'/'NaN' → NaN guarded by !isNaN → score stays FINITE 0..100. Not assassin-driven (no derived contract for this LENS_ACTION); authored spec pinned by server/tests/commonsense-lens-macros.test.js.
